full_command_line: SETUP (network ON, one-time pre-fetch of the uncached models): cd /tmp/fdb-slice-15a-6b8503da/src/python && export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES="" HF_HOME=/home/coreyt/projects/fathomdb/dev/research/eu-0/hf_cache TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM=false && /home/coreyt/projects/fathomdb/dev/research/eu-0/.venv/bin/python -c "from transformers import AutoModel, AutoTokenizer; [ (AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(m, trust_remote_code=tr), AutoModel.from_pretrained(m, trust_remote_code=tr)) for m,tr in [('Alibaba-NLP/gte-base-en-v1.5',True),('intfloat/e5-base-v2',False),('nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5',True)] ]"   ###   MEASURED RUN (offline): cd /tmp/fdb-slice-15a-6b8503da/src/python && export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES="" HF_HOME=/home/coreyt/projects/fathomdb/dev/research/eu-0/hf_cache TOKENIZERS_PARALLELISM=false HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1 && PYTHONPATH=. /home/coreyt/projects/fathomdb/dev/research/eu-0/.venv/bin/python -m eval.s15a_embedder_probe --full --threads 4 --resume --cache-dir /tmp/fdb-s15a-cache-full --out-json /tmp/fdb-slice-15a-6b8503da/dev/plans/runs/0.8.3-s15a-embedder.json --out-md /tmp/fdb-slice-15a-6b8503da/dev/plans/runs/0.8.3-s15a-report.md

tests_run.pure_logic: FATHOMDB_TESTS_NO_REBUILD=1 PYTHONPATH=. .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_s15a_embedder_probe.py -m 'not integration' -q  => 6 passed, 2 deselected
tests_run.integration_cpu: validated under dev/research/eu-0/.venv (CPU, threads=1): embed determinism byte-identical + L2-normalized + cls!=mean (the eu-0 venv has no pytest, so the two @pytest.mark.integration test bodies were exercised directly via the eu-0 python)

pyright: 0 errors, 0 warnings (pyright --pythonpath <canonical .venv python>; torch/transformers are lazy + type:ignored)

hard_subset.definition: non-negative qids whose required docs are NOT all within BM25 Okapi top-50 (strict all-of)
hard_subset.note: actual reproduced frozen count over the full 10506-doc corpus; the design ~596 reference is NOT forced (design §4/§11.1)

notes: corpus_hash fe973fcd49fbbda083158f69fe720f17858ab8528e171fa2188eec84131c7d4e re-verified per-source AND combined before any embedding; gold all.gold.json carries the same hash; qrels_version=ir-c-reused-v1, 4597 queries (4472 non-negative, 125 negative excluded from the recall denominator).

Gate consumed verbatim from decision_rule_083.probe_15a_pass (NOT reimplemented/relaxed; no raw-point gate). chosen_embedder = largest-headroom (min(eu8_ci_lo,hard_ci_lo), projected_eu7 tiebreak) passer that is in_library_feasible, else bge-small (no swap).

in_library_feasible: gte-base=False (no candle GTE encoder) -> measured for attribution but NOT selectable; e5-base-v2 marked True pending a candle-BERT-path load verification at pin time (design §3 note 2) -- the runner records the flag, the orchestrator should confirm e5 loads via fathomdb-embedder's BERT path before adopting it.

projected_eu7: mean-centering ON (per-corpus mean subtracted before sign-quant on docs AND queries; f32 rerank uses un-centered vectors), Hamming K=192; GATE is the frozen POINT >= 0.90 via probe_15a_pass (a transparency CI may be added later; the point gate is authoritative, design §5.4/§11.4).
cpu_feasible = ms_per_query <= 3.0 x base_ms_per_query; AC012/AC013 absolutes recorded for context only (authoritative latency re-measure is Slice 20's engine gate).

Determinism: torch.set_num_threads(1) pins the determinism assertion; runtime recorded (torch 2.12.0+cpu, transformers 5.9.0, numpy 2.4.6). Measured run sets HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1 + TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1; SETUP pre-fetches weights with network ON.
memory_class_recall = null (report-only): the LME re-pin corpus is separate from the IR snapshot; deferred to Slice 20 re-embed (design §4), recorded with reason, not faked.

Smoke (committed proof): pipeline green end-to-end on a 120-doc subset, base bge-small + candidate bge-base, threads=1, offline; degenerate metrics (eu8=1.0, hard_count=0) by construction -- it is a pipeline proof, NOT a measurement.
Resilience: per-model doc/query f32 vectors checkpointed to atomic .npy under --cache-dir; --resume reuses them (a multi-hour CPU embed survives restart).

DID NOT run --full (orchestrator owns the resilient full measurement, per the task). DID pre-fetch BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 for the smoke; gte-base/e5-base-v2/nomic-v1.5 still need the SETUP pre-fetch before the offline --full.
Stage 1 only (mechanical probe_15a_pass verdict + ranking + chosen embedder). Stage 2 (gap-relative surpass finalization) defers to after D0b/HITL (design §6).
next_step_for_orchestrator: Run SETUP pre-fetch then the offline --full command above; codex §9 review on the branch; land on main after D0b; feed chosen_embedder into Slice 20 (verify e5-base-v2 candle-BERT load at pin time).
